typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveUpdates as string (),
	FileName as string (),
	NewWeekLCM as integer (),
	Owner as string (),
	PrevWeekRC as integer (),
	sArchiveUpdates as string (),
	sFileLCMNew as string (),
	TimeStamp as string ()
}

source(output(
		Ramservername as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Fundingdate as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Productname as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Environment as string,
		Lcmstatus as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> RawLCMNEw
RawLCMNEw derive(Import_date = toString(currentDate())) ~> Importdate
Importdate sink(input(
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Productname as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		Environment as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Fundingdate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Rtplannedactivity,
		Applicationids,
		Cio,
		Ciodirectname,
		Hweoldate,
		Cioname,
		Ciodirect,
		Rtdecomdate,
		Rtplancertifieddate,
		Primarytechmgr,
		Ramservername,
		Cistatus,
		Lcmstatus,
		Normalizedos,
		Rtstatus,
		Productname,
		Primaryapplication,
		Environment,
		Import_date,
		Managedbygroup,
		Fundingdate)) ~> tblLCMNewWeekTracking
